nasb.text: On the twenty-first of the seventh month, the word of the Lord came by Haggai the prophet saying,

esv.text: In the seventh month, on the twenty-first day of the month, the word of the Lord came by the hand of Haggai the prophet:

cnv.text: 七月二十一日，耶和華的話臨到哈該先知說：

ccb.text: 七月二十一日，耶和华对先知哈该说：
